title: Operations Executive (Logistics & Documentation) | East Coast | Up to $3.2K
description:
• $2,500 – $2,800 (Entry Level) | $2,800 – $3,200 (1 year+ experience).

  • 5-Day Work Week (Must be able to work late if required).

  • East Zone of Singapore (Convenient for residents in Tampines, Pasir Ris, Bedok).

  • Comprehensive on-the-job training provided for those new to the industry.

Job Summary

We are looking for a self-motivated and responsible Operations Executive to join our logistics team. You will be the engine of our daily operations, handling critical shipping documentation and ensuring smooth import/export flows. This is an excellent opportunity for individuals with high initiative who are looking to build a career in Singapore's vibrant logistics sector.

Responsibilities

  • Documentation Management: Handle daily operational paperwork including Import/Export Permits, Air Waybills (AWB), and Bills of Lading (B/L).

  • Operational Flow: Coordinate and monitor daily shipments to ensure timely delivery and compliance.

  • System Updates: Utilize Microsoft Office and internal systems to maintain accurate records.

  • Independent Execution: Manage tasks with minimal supervision, demonstrating strong initiative and problem-solving skills.

  • Ad-hoc Duties: Support the team during peak periods, including staying late to ensure daily targets are met.

Requirements

  • Minimum GCE ‘O’ or ‘N’ Level.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).

  • Ability to speak and write good English for professional documentation and client interaction.

  • Male applicants must have completed National Service (ORD).

  • Must currently reside in the East Zone of Singapore.

  • Self-motivated, responsible, and capable of working independently in a fast-paced environment.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
